caption: My first post from Zyng! 🚀 Feeling super pumped about the XPRIZE Hackathon! Dem say Nigeria no they carry last, and Zyng is live to prove am! Standard Pro features are 100% active. Abeg check details inside. #Zyng #XPRIZE #Gemini #BuildWithGemini
